arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the key pair.

create_time.description: The date and time when the key pair was created.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier for the key pair, typically used for verification.

id.description: The ID of the key pair.

key_type.description: The type of the key pair, such as RSA or ED25519.

public_key.description: The public key material of the key pair.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the key pair.
